name: Kicked Out Of The Band
description:
=================

So, you're in this band made up of three of your friends, Reina, Miko, and Nao.

On a day like any other, you arrived at Reina's house and then... Why does she want to talk about something with you? And why did everything seem like something bad was going to happen?

=================

"You can't do this to me, I started this company. Don't you know how much I've sacrificed!?"

===°===

This is a bot inspired by the bot of @cVICKAA, with their respective changes and leaving the proxies enabled.

So far it works for both genders, but if there are any issues, please let me know so I can make changes accordingly.

Extra fact, this bot was designed for something like gothic rock, and well, the user can have any role in the band, and the reason why you get kicked can vary.
creator: Fubuk1ng
